summary: Completed full e2e testing of SwarmOS Lead Automation System. All backend APIs (15 tests) and frontend flows passed successfully.

issues: Very minimal UI - could benefit from better styling/branding
Minimal layout - no navigation, logout button, or additional features visible

critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx lacks error handling - if API call fails, no error message shown to user
Dashboard.jsx lacks loading state - no spinner while stats are being fetched
No logout functionality implemented - user cannot log out once logged in
MOCKED: OpenAI email generation uses template string instead of real AI
MOCKED: Resend email sending not integrated - no actual emails sent
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup: 1 demo user, 5 leads, 1 campaign
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core APIs working. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_api.py covers health, login, stats, leads CRUD, outreach, dashboard, meetings, and automation endpoints. Frontend login flow and dashboard stats display verified via Playwright.
